Notice Of Mtn And Mtn For Order To Show Cause Why Vickie R. Johnson, Aka Vickie Sloan, Individually Should Not Be Held In Contempt
Off Calendar Jul-10-2006 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Mtn To Compel Answers To Post Judgment Discovery & For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jan-27-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff's motion to compel responses to post judgment interrogatories and request for production of documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is ordered to provide complete verified responses without objection within 21 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $336.30 are to be paid within 21 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-08-2005 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants
